---
title: "Simple Causal Inference of Persuasion Effects with 'persuasio'"
author: "Xinrui Chen"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{persuasio_vignette}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

## What is this for?

This shows the basic usage of the **persuasio** package for the causal inference of persuasion effects (@JunLee2023).

```{r setup}
library(persuasio)
```
